description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a two-story structure, set within a rectangular lot bordered by low walls and landscaping elements. The front facade features three large arches forming a covered porch, with a set of steps leading up to the main entrance. The upper floor has a balcony with a simple railing, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with some areas accented by darker trim and a tiled pathway leading to the entrance. The lot includes paved walkways, outdoor seating, and clusters of decorative shrubs or rocks. The overall design is clean and geometric, emphasizing open outdoor spaces and functional living areas.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, arched front porch, balcony, and landscaped lot featuring paved walkways and decorative shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched porch, main entrance steps, balcony, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, upper balcony, and the extent of the paved lot with landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back steps, minimal window openings, and a large cluster of shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side stairs, additional outdoor seating, and the continuation of the paved area.
